ogTitle: Avenell Heights vs Avoca Vale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Avenell Heights and Avoca Vale.
heading: Avenell Heights vs Avoca Vale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Avenell Heights, Queensland and Avoca Vale, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Avoca Vale has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Avenell Heights (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Avenell Heights or Avoca Vale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Avenell Heights has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Avoca Vale scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Avenell Heights scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Avoca Vale scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Avenell Heights or Avoca Vale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Avoca Vale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
